  "finding_id": "openscap_031",
  "rule_id": "Verify Permissions on Backup group File",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "The finding involves correcting file permissions on /etc/group-, a non-critical system file. The recommended chmod operation does not affect authentication services or network configuration and is unlikely to cause lockout or service interruption.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "Potential overwriting of existing permissions if misapplied",
    "Requires root privileges"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Execute the remediation command: sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group-",
    "Verify the new permissions with 'ls -l /etc/group-'",
    "Monitor system logs for any unexpected access issues"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": true}
